podcasts.name: Davie Fogarty
podcasts.title: I’m scared, so I do it anyway
podcasts.transcript: Today we're going for a swim. Yesterday we ditched it cuz the waves were very big. It's kind of funny. I always feel like a wuss talking about anxiety cuz I bring it up so much. Some people don't talk about it very much. At the end of the day, all of this stuff, deep water, like the surf yesterday, even sharks, that kind of stuff. Anyway where you have a lack of control, I get this huge sense of like anxiety, but this is kind of like why I do it. This is about exposure therapy, just putting yourself in these situations. Sure, I'm not scared of snakes and spiders and stuff like that, but pretty much everything else, public speaking, I'm terrified of. That's why we do it. You just got to put yourself out there.
